name: task-swarm
description: Multi-agent orchestration driven by a pipeline.yml: semantic task groups with cross-group concurrency, fork coders, and per-group reviewer + validator loops. v0.5 added P2-1 feedback loop. v0.6 added twin md output under knowledge-base/. v0.7 lands FIX-1 + FIX-2 + 0.7.3 方案 D path injection. 0.7.4 强化方案 D（M5+M6+M10）：task.md 段头加 subdir 扫描规则说明 + 硬约束语言（'Edit/Bash 前必读否则 reviewer 扣分'）+ inbox 自动 drop `_PROJECT_AGENT_DOCS.md` sentinel（同时 redundant 信号 + 修 inbox 空目录 name-vs-fact 不一致）。Requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.3+ (codemap knowledge CLI).
